experiment_title: Preparation of 100 mL Sodium Chloride Standard Solution

      <Component id="beaker_1" type="beaker" capacity="100ml" />
      <Component id="volumetric_flask_1" type="volumetric_flask" capacity="100ml" />

      <Component id="dropper_1" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="graduated_cylinder_1" type="graduated_cylinder" capacity="100ml" />

      <Reagent name="NaCl" state="solid" />
      <Reagent name="Distilled_Water" state="liquid" />

    <Procedure>
      <Add vessel="beaker_1" reagent="NaCl" id="step_0" />
      <Add vessel="beaker_1" reagent="H2O" volume="40 ml" id="step_1" />
      <Stir vessel="beaker_1" id="step_2" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_3" />
      <Transfer from_vessel="beaker_1" to_vessel="volumetric_flask_1" tool="glass_rod_1" id="step_4" />

      <Transfer from_vessel="beaker_1" to_vessel="volumetric_flask_1" volume="10 ml" id="step_7" />
      <Add vessel="beaker_1" reagent="H2O" volume="10 ml" id="step_8" />
      <Stir vessel="beaker_1" id="step_9" />
      <Transfer from_vessel="beaker_1" to_vessel="volumetric_flask_1" volume="10 ml" id="step_10" />
      <Add vessel="volumetric_flask_1" reagent="H2O" tool="dropper_1" id="step_11" />
      <Insert tool="stopper_1" vessel="volumetric_flask_1" id="step_12" />
      <Stir vessel="volumetric_flask_1" id="step_13" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_14" />

将配制好的标准溶液转移到量筒，准备后续使用或分装。
